name: MysterySchool Code
summary: A manifestation program framed around teachings attributed to ancient Egyptian mystery schools, presented as a path to unlocking abundance.
best_for: readers drawn to ancient-wisdom framed manifestation content

name: Seraphina Tarot
summary: A personalized online tarot reading service that generates a custom card spread and interpretation from a few details you provide.
best_for: people curious about tarot who want a quick personalized reading

name: Prosperity Birth Code Reading
summary: A personalized 'birth code' reading pitched as revealing a prosperity blueprint based on your birth details, aimed at the wealth-manifestation audience.
best_for: astrology and numerology fans curious about a personalized wealth reading
